title: pelargonium patentissimum
intro: Pelargonium patentissimum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, native to South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium patentissimum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and exhibiting antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to digestive problems.
